name: Turkey Slices with Green Peppercorn Sauce
recipeIngredient: 1 cup 1/4 lb Turkey breast, thinly sliced
recipeInstructions:
1. Season turkey slices.
2. In a large skillet, heat oil and butter; sauté turkey 2 minutes on each side, then remove and keep warm.
3. Add remaining ingredients to the skillet and simmer for 5 minutes.
4. Serve sauce over turkey slices.
